questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt: Consider the following statements regarding the National Level Pollution Response Exercise (NATPOLREX): 1. It is a biennial exercise conducted by the Indian Coast Guard. 2. It aims to evaluate and enhance India's preparedness to respond to marine oil spill incidents. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
questions.explanation: Statement 1 is correct: NATPOLREX is a biennial flagship exercise conducted by the Indian Coast Guard (ICG). Statement 2 is correct: Its primary objective is to evaluate and enhance India's national preparedness to respond to marine oil spill incidents.
questions.takeaway: NATPOLREX is the Indian Coast Guard's biennial exercise focused specifically on marine oil spill response preparedness.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: The Indian Coast Guard (ICG) conducted its 10th edition. A biennial flagship exercise which aims to evaluate and enhance India’s national preparedness to respond to marine oil spill incidents.
